summary: Spec review accepts the bounded Harbor Runtime API adapter slice for App/Core consumption.
reviewed_validation_summary: `pnpm typecheck`, `pnpm test`, `pnpm smoke:runtime`, HTTP readiness/provider readback, `git diff --check`, `loom fact-chain --target . --json`, `loom verify --target . --json`, `loom suite validate --target . --item HARBOR-219 --json`, `loom suite carrier validate --target . --item HARBOR-219 --json`, and `loom suite evidence validate --target . --item HARBOR-219 --json` passed locally on 2026-07-08 UTC.
follow_ups: Core and App must still consume this API through their own Work Items before any product milestone closeout.

semantic_review_disposition.reason: The spec is constrained to a local Harbor Runtime HTTP adapter over existing runtime capabilities, with readiness, provider, identity, session, snapshot, and refs-only evidence endpoints.

implementation_review_disposition.reason: The implementation contract excludes hosted browser, real account/profile actions, production page automation, raw credentials, raw browser material, write actions, Core/Lode/App changes, merge, and issue closeout.
